s2.ptxt: Check for continuity of the antenna.

atten4.ptxt: Check for continuity at the center of each antenna wire as shown in the illustration.

item.ptxt: When cleaning the glass, wipe it in the direction of the wire with a soft, dry cloth. Take care not to damage the wire. Do not use detergents or glass cleaners with abrasive ingredients.
When measuring voltage, wrap a piece of tin foil around the tip of the negative probe and press the foil against the wire with your finger, as shown in the illustration.

specitem.ptxt: There is continuity in the antenna.

s2.ptxt: If the result is not as specified, repair the window glass antenna wire.
